data.name: Hentai Girls Nature
data.detailed_description:
This is a relaxing puzzle game that showcases many sexy girls. Engage in the delightful atmosphere set by soothing music as you solve puzzles. Rearrange puzzle pieces to advance through levels and unlock extra viewing options. Experience the pleasure of uncovering the full image after each puzzle without any time limits.



Features:

Pictures of sexy girls & calming music.
Full-view mode available upon completing each level.
Numerous levels with different difficulty levels for extended entertainment.
data.about_the_game:
This is a relaxing puzzle game that showcases many sexy girls. Engage in the delightful atmosphere set by soothing music as you solve puzzles. Rearrange puzzle pieces to advance through levels and unlock extra viewing options. Experience the pleasure of uncovering the full image after each puzzle without any time limits.



Features:

Pictures of sexy girls & calming music.
Full-view mode available upon completing each level.
Numerous levels with different difficulty levels for extended entertainment.
data.short_description: This is a puzzle game featuring a variety of unique and alluring girls. Dive into a jigsaw puzzle adventure, where players rearrange pieces to recreate the original image.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
